examples: The bedstead is much about my size.
He had an iron bedstead, which he boasted was fit for everyone.
Should you prefer a bedstead, there are two types – a sprung slat that gives more of a spring, and a solid slat that has a firmer feel.
When his sister wakes up to find her hair tied to the bedstead, everyone assumes Jared is the culprit.
The next day, though, when Nader returns from work, he finds his father tied to a bedstead and Razieh nowhere to be seen.
